titleStmt.title: Translation of NLS Adv. MS 15.1.18, no. 22

p.seg: To all sons of Holy Mother Church, Richard by the grace of God bishop of St Andrew the apostle, greeting and episcopal benediction:

Let those to come as well as those present know that we have given and granted and by the present written document made firm, to God and to the church of blessed Andrew the apostle and to the canons serving God in that place now and in the future, the chapel of Inchture, with everything rightfully pertaining to the same chapel, in perpetual alms, for the welfare of my soul, and of my predecessors’ and successors’ souls, saving episcopal customs.

With these witnesses: Gregory, bishop of Dunkeld; Matthew, archdeacon of St Andrews; Master Andrew, archdeacon of Lothian; Geoffrey, abbot of Dunfermline; Alured, abbot of Stirling; William, abbot of Holyrood; Master Herbert; Master Abraham; Alexander the chaplain; Robert, son of Seulf of Perth; Stephen the clerk; Odo, brother of Archdeacon Matthew.
